response.justification: The candidate demonstrates broad engineering experience, strong open-source contributions, and full-stack fluency, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy expertise, or the 15-year technical depth required for a director-level AI strategy role; startup-like initiative is present but not aligned with enterprise AI platform innovation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across languages and domains
Proven open-source leadership with impactful GIS and tooling projects
Strong track record of teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No clear demonstration of AI/ML product development or cloud AI platform design
Resume name and contact details mismatch (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Szabo Bogdan)
Lacks documented leadership in enterprise AI strategy or customer-facing AI advisory
